text:
# uname -srm
FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p12 amd64

# less /etc/make.conf
#BATCH=YES
#FORCE_PKG_REGISTER=YES
CPUTYPE?=core2
OPTIONS_SET=CUPS
WITHOUT_LPR=YES
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=apache=2.4
QT4_OPTIONS=CUPS NAS QGTKSTYLE
LOCALIZED_LANG=ru
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=perl5=5.20
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=mysql=5.7
